creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Looking at https://cdn.kernel.org/pub/linux/utils/util-linux/v2.30/ the change can't really download the file, or can it?

And why update to 2.30.2 if 2.37 is available?

FWIW, I haven't updated the port because flock works fine but I'm not opposed to progress and happy to test or provide the patch to update to 2.37.


Cheers,
Franco
